---
title: "Dengdeng"
subtitle: |
    Full-Time Stay-at-Home Little Boss \
    PAW Patrol Superfan
image: "files/dengdeng/avatar.png"
resources: "files/dengdeng/*"
about:
    id: pi-info
    template: trestles
    image-shape: round
# date-format: "MMM, YYYY"
page-layout: full
toc: false
search: false
page-navigation: false
title-block-banner: false
---

:::{#pi-info}

Hi everyone! My name is Dengdeng. I am growing bigger every day.

My favorite people are Mommy and Daddy ❤️ <br>
My favorite food is little mushrooms 🍄   <br>
My favorite answer to everything is “No, no, no!” 😆

But my super-duper favorite is PAW Patrol! 🐶

Nice to meet you!

## Education

- **Home University** | Since 2023
    - Major: Eating, Sleeping, Playing, Running, and Laughing
    - Advisors: Mommy and Daddy
